name: Muza Roof Bistro
price_note: Lunch set 36 zł, breakfast 28–38 zł, coffee 10–21 zł
description_en: Rooftop bistro on the 6th floor of the Academy of Music building in Kraków's Old Town. One of the best panoramic views in the city — overlooking Wawel Castle, St. Mary's Basilica and the historic centre. Serves breakfast, lunch and specialty coffee. Known as a hidden gem — recently reopened to the public.
description_pl: Bistro na dachu Akademii Muzycznej przy ul. Św. Tomasza 43. Jeden z najlepszych widoków w Krakowie — panorama na Wawel i Stare Miasto. Śniadania, lunch, kawa. Idealne na spokojną chwilę z dala od turystów.
highlights: Best rooftop panorama in Kraków Old Town
Views of Wawel Castle and St. Mary's Basilica
Hidden gem — not well known to tourists

menu_items.name: Croque Madame
menu_items.description: Rye-wheat toast with béchamel, Gruyère, ham, fried egg, mixed greens with vinaigrette

menu_items.description: Rye-wheat toast with béchamel, Gruyère and ham, mixed greens with vinaigrette

menu_items.description: Fluffy 3-egg omelette on artisan bread with sweet-soy glazed bacon, chives and sesame

menu_items.name: Coconut Oatmeal
menu_items.description: Creamy coconut milk oatmeal with sour cherry compote and dark chocolate flakes

menu_items.name: Lunch Set
menu_items.description: Daily main course + soup of the day

notes: Reopened to public as of spring 2026. Film 'Vinci' was shot here. From April 18, 2026 — weekends open 09:00–16:00.
